parameters.content:
## [Utility] Score Lead v1.0.0

Scores an inbound lead 1-10 and drafts a follow-up email.
This is the **lead qualification score only** — not a review score, RAG score, or any other AI score.

**Called by:** [Intake] CAIAC Lead Capture, future SMS/chat intake workflows

**Input fields:** client_id, name, business_name, business_type, challenge, how_heard, from_name
**Output fields:** qualification_score, qualification_score_reason, email_subject, email_body, tokens_in, tokens_out, cost_estimate

Caller is responsible for logging tokens to caiac.ai_usage_log.

parameters.query:
SELECT CASE
  WHEN '{{ $('Execute Workflow Trigger').first().json.client_id }}'::text IS NULL OR '{{ $('Execute Workflow Trigger').first().json.client_id }}'::text = '' THEN true
  ELSE COALESCE(
    (SELECT enabled FROM caiac.client_features WHERE client_id = '{{ $('Execute Workflow Trigger').first().json.client_id }}'::uuid AND feature = 'lead_scoring'),
    true
  )
END AS enabled

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: "claude-sonnet-4-6", max_tokens: 1024, messages: [{ role: "user", content: "You are a lead qualification assistant for CAIAC Digital, a Central Indiana company selling private self-hosted AI and workflow automation to small businesses in the trades/service vertical (HVAC, roofing, plumbing, etc.) and beyond.

Score this inbound lead 1-10 on likelihood to become a paying client. Consider: business type fit, relevance of their challenge to what CAIAC solves, source quality, and apparent readiness to invest.

Also draft a warm, professional follow-up email from " + $json.from_name + ".

Respond ONLY with valid JSON — no markdown fences, no extra text:
{"qualification_score": 8, "qualification_score_reason": "one concise sentence", "email_subject": "subject line", "email_body": "full plain-text email body"}

Lead:
Name: " + $json.name + "
Business: " + $json.business_name + "
Type: " + $json.business_type + "
Challenge: " + $json.challenge + "
How they heard about us: " + $json.how_heard }] }) }}
